LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JUNSEONG PARK'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF COMPLAINT ON SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT JUNSEOUNG PARK. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SATISFIED HIS BURDEN OF ESTABLISHING EITHER GENERAL OR SPECIFIC PERSONAL JURISDICTION OVER JUNSEONG PARK. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR # 11918

Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Continued To Jul-25-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause for Failure to File Order Granting Motion to Quash per Jan-19-2012 Ruling.

Appearances: Mr. Alex Park, Esq. for Defendant Yena Park. Counsel for Plaintiff advises the Court that the Order re Motion to Quash Sevice of Complaint on Junseong Park was filed on 6-8-2012. The Court orders this matter set for a Case Management Conference on 7-25-2012 at 2:00 pm in Department 610. Court to send notice.

Visiting Judge Wallace Douglas (Retired), Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2012 Continued To Apr-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion In Support Of Motion To Quash Service Of Complaint On Specially Appearing Deft Junseoung Park
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANT JUNSEONG PARK'S Motion To Quash Service Of Complaint On Specially Appearing Defendant Junseoung Park IS Granted. Plaintiff has not satisfied his burden of establishing either general or specific personal jurisdiction over Junseong Park. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)
